title: Are Aliens Just Time Traveling HUMANS From The Future?
summary: This interview explores the hypothesis that alien beings, particularly gray aliens, are actually humans from the future who have developed time travel capabilities. The discussion examines evolutionary evidence supporting this theory, including physical characteristics of reported aliens that align with projected human evolutionary trajectories.

key_claims.claim: Aliens are humans from the future who figured out time travel and are coming back to visit us
Gray aliens have physical characteristics consistent with projected human evolution including small noses, small ears, and slit-like eyes
Gray aliens are constantly described as childlike and about 3 feet tall, consistent with the evolutionary concept of neoteny
Navy Commander George Hoover held top secret clearance for most of his life and admitted that the beings in the Roswell crash were time traveling humans
